label: Read Conversation
description: Read and decrypt a conversation transcript from ClickHouse messages and traces

configSchema.name: enrichWithTraces
configSchema.label: Enrich With Traces
configSchema.description: Include tool calls and escalation data

configSchema.name: roles
configSchema.label: Message Roles
configSchema.description: Filter messages by role

messages.description: Array of decrypted messages with metadata

label: Read Message Window
description: Fetches triggering message and recent context window for real-time processing

configSchema.name: windowSize
configSchema.label: Window Size
configSchema.description: Number of prior messages to fetch for context

configSchema.name: includeToolCalls
configSchema.label: Include Tool Calls
configSchema.description: Enrich with recent tool call traces

triggeringMessage.description: The message that triggered the pipeline

label: Compute Sentiment
description: LLM-based per-message sentiment scoring with conversation trajectory analysis, shift detection, and frustration detection

configSchema.name: shiftThreshold
configSchema.label: Shift Threshold
configSchema.description: Minimum sentiment delta between consecutive messages to count as a sentiment shift

configSchema.name: frustrationThreshold
configSchema.label: Frustration Threshold
configSchema.description: Sentiment score at or below which a message is considered frustrated

configSchema.name: defaultConfidence
configSchema.label: Default Confidence
configSchema.description: Confidence score applied to all scored messages

conversationSentiment.description: Session-level sentiment aggregates (avg, start, end, min, max, trajectory, shifts, frustration)

messageSentiments.description: Per-message sentiment scores with labels and frustration flags

columns.name: sentiment_shift_count
columns.description: Number of sentiment shifts exceeding threshold

label: Classify Intent
description: LLM-based intent classification with configurable taxonomy

configSchema.name: taxonomy
configSchema.label: Intent Taxonomy
configSchema.description: Define intent categories with their intents. If omitted, intents are auto-discovered from conversation content.

configSchema.name: confidenceThreshold
configSchema.label: Confidence Threshold
configSchema.description: Below this confidence, intent is marked as the unknown label

configSchema.name: inputMessageStrategy
configSchema.label: Message Selection Strategy
configSchema.description: Which messages to send to the LLM for classification

configSchema.name: inputMessageCount
configSchema.label: Message Count
configSchema.description: Maximum number of messages for classification (only when strategy is first_n_user)

configSchema.name: unknownIntentLabel
configSchema.label: Unknown Intent Label
configSchema.description: Label applied when confidence is below threshold

configSchema.name: taxonomyVersion
configSchema.label: Taxonomy Version
configSchema.description: Version tag written to ClickHouse for tracking taxonomy changes over time

configSchema.name: classificationPrompt
configSchema.label: Custom Classification Prompt
configSchema.description: Override the built-in classification system prompt (advanced users only)

isAutoDiscovered.description: True if intent was not in the provided taxonomy

columns.name: is_auto_discovered
columns.description: 1 if intent not in provided taxonomy

label: Evaluate Quality
description: LLM-based conversation quality evaluation with configurable dimensions and outcome classification

configSchema.name: dimensions
configSchema.label: Quality Dimensions
configSchema.description: Define what dimensions to evaluate. Each dimension gets a 1-5 score from the LLM judge.

itemSchema.name: weight
itemSchema.label: Weight
itemSchema.description: Relative weight for overall score calculation

configSchema.name: domainContext
configSchema.label: Domain Context
configSchema.description: Domain-specific context that helps the LLM judge evaluate more accurately
configSchema.placeholder: e.g. This is a healthcare support agent that helps patients schedule appointments...

configSchema.name: flagThreshold
configSchema.label: Flag Threshold
configSchema.description: Overall score below which the conversation is flagged for review

overallScore.description: Weighted average of dimension scores (0-5 scale)

outcome.description: contained_resolved, contained_partial, contained_unresolved, escalated, or abandoned

outcomeMethod.description: How outcome was determined: heuristic, llm_evaluated, or heuristic_fallback

goalDetected.description: Goal extracted from conversation (null if none)

goalAchieved.description: Whether the detected goal was achieved (null if no goal)

columns.name: custom_dimensions
columns.description: JSON string of additional custom dimension scores

columns.name: outcome
columns.description: contained_resolved, contained_partial, contained_unresolved, escalated, or abandoned

label: Extract Mentions
description: LLM-based extraction of competitors, feature requests, bug reports, and channel switches from conversations

configSchema.name: companyName
configSchema.label: Your Company Name
configSchema.description: Your company name — excluded from competitor detection so your own brand is not flagged

configSchema.name: competitors
configSchema.label: Known Competitors
configSchema.description: List of known competitor names for targeted detection. Leave empty for auto-detection of any competitor mentions.

configSchema.name: mentionTypes
configSchema.label: Mention Types to Extract
configSchema.description: Which mention types to look for in the conversation

mentions.description: Array of extracted mentions with type, text, detail, and confidence

byType.description: Counts by type: { competitor, feature_request, bug_report, channel_switch }

columns.name: mention_text
columns.description: The extracted mention text (e.g. competitor name)

columns.name: mention_detail
columns.description: Detail of what was requested, reported, or mentioned

label: Conversation Analyzer
description: LLM-based evaluation with pluggable profiles: hallucination, knowledge gap, guardrail, and context preservation

configSchema.name: evaluationType
configSchema.label: Evaluation Profile
configSchema.description: Which LLM evaluation profile to run

configSchema.name: systemPromptOverride
configSchema.label: Custom Evaluation Prompt
configSchema.description: Override the built-in system prompt for this evaluation profile

configSchema.name: flagThreshold
configSchema.label: Flag Threshold
configSchema.description: Score below which the evaluation is flagged. Defaults vary by profile (hallucination: 0.5, knowledge_gap: 0.5, guardrail: 0.5, context_preservation: 0.6).

label: Compute Toxicity
description: Score message toxicity for a session using keyword/pattern detection (zero AI cost)

configSchema.name: threshold
configSchema.label: Toxicity Threshold
configSchema.description: Score above which a message is considered toxic

configSchema.name: includeAgent
configSchema.label: Include Agent Messages
configSchema.description: Also score assistant messages for toxicity

label: Compute Tool Effectiveness
description: Analyze tool call accuracy, retry rate, and efficiency from ClickHouse traces

configSchema.name: tools
configSchema.label: Tool Filter
configSchema.description: Filter to specific tool names. Leave empty to analyze all tools.

configSchema.name: minCalls
configSchema.label: Minimum Calls
configSchema.description: Minimum calls for a tool to be included in analysis

label: Statistical Analysis
description: Statistical analysis with three profiles: friction detection, anomaly detection (z-score/SPC), and drift detection

configSchema.name: analysisType
configSchema.label: Analysis Type
configSchema.description: Which statistical analysis profile to run

configSchema.name: metricTable
configSchema.label: Metric Table
configSchema.description: ClickHouse table containing the metric time-series data

configSchema.name: metricColumn
configSchema.label: Metric Column
configSchema.description: Column name containing the metric values to analyze

configSchema.name: dateColumn
configSchema.label: Date Column
configSchema.description: Date/time column for time-series filtering

drift_score.description: Percentage change between baseline and current (drift_detection)

columns.name: message_length_trend
columns.description: Linear regression slope of message lengths

columns.name: turn_count_zscore
columns.description: Z-score of turn count vs average

label: Compute Predictive Features
description: Aggregates per-customer signals and computes weighted churn risk scores

configSchema.name: lookbackDays
configSchema.label: Lookback Days
configSchema.description: Number of days to look back for feature aggregation

label: Evaluate Metrics
description: Threshold-based metric evaluation against step outputs and pipeline input

configSchema.name: metrics
configSchema.label: Metric Rules
configSchema.description: Metric rules with thresholds and weights for scoring

itemSchema.name: field
itemSchema.label: Field Expression
itemSchema.description: Dot-path expression to the value being checked

itemSchema.name: weight
itemSchema.label: Weight
itemSchema.description: Relative weight for overall score calculation

scores.description: Metric name -> { value, passed, score } mapping

label: Evaluate Policy
description: Rule-based policy evaluation with violation tracking and severity levels

configSchema.name: policyId
configSchema.label: Policy ID
configSchema.description: Policy identifier label for tracking

configSchema.name: rules
configSchema.label: Policy Rules
configSchema.description: Evaluation rules. Each rule checks a field expression against an expected value.

itemSchema.name: field
itemSchema.label: Field Expression
itemSchema.description: Dot-path expression to the value being checked

itemSchema.name: expected
itemSchema.label: Expected Value
itemSchema.description: Value to compare against (string, number, or boolean)

itemSchema.name: severity
itemSchema.label: Severity
itemSchema.description: Violation severity level. Critical = immediate FAIL, Warning = WARN status, Info = logged only.

summary.description: { passed, failed, warnings, total } rule counts

violations.description: Array of { rule, actual, expected, severity } for failed rules

label: LLM Evaluate
description: Tag-driven LLM evaluation with schema validation, strict retry, score extraction, and auto-storage to ClickHouse

configSchema.name: tag
configSchema.label: Evaluation Tag
configSchema.description: Tag identifier for this evaluation (e.g. 'intent_accuracy'). Results are stored per tag.

configSchema.name: systemPrompt
configSchema.label: System Prompt
configSchema.description: System instructions for the LLM evaluator

configSchema.name: userPrompt
configSchema.label: User Prompt
configSchema.description: User prompt with {{steps.X.output.Y}} template placeholders

configSchema.name: outputSchema
configSchema.label: Output Schema
configSchema.description: JSON Schema for expected LLM output. Injected into system prompt.

configSchema.name: strict
configSchema.label: Strict Mode
configSchema.description: Retry on JSON parse or schema validation failure (max 2 retries)

configSchema.name: scoreField
configSchema.label: Score Field
configSchema.description: Field name in LLM output to extract as the numeric score

configSchema.name: model
configSchema.label: Model
configSchema.description: LLM model override (uses project default if not set)

configSchema.name: temperature
configSchema.label: Temperature
configSchema.description: LLM sampling temperature (0 = deterministic)

configSchema.name: maxTokens
configSchema.label: Max Tokens
configSchema.description: Maximum number of output tokens

label: Store Results
description: Write step outputs to a storage destination (ClickHouse, MongoDB, or HTTP callback)

configSchema.name: destination
configSchema.label: Destination
configSchema.description: Target storage backend

configSchema.name: storageStrategy
configSchema.label: Storage Strategy
configSchema.description: Recommended mode writes one numeric analytics score to ClickHouse and the full document payload to MongoDB

configSchema.name: __destination_clickhouse_hint
configSchema.description: Leave Table / Collection empty to use abl_platform.custom_pipeline_results. Enter an existing database.table only when you want this node to write to a custom ClickHouse table.

configSchema.name: __preview_unsupported_mongo
configSchema.description: Leave Table / Collection empty to use custom_pipeline_results. Enter an existing collection name only when you want this node to write to a custom MongoDB collection. Preview is not supported because the Observability Preview tab reads from ClickHouse only.

configSchema.name: __preview_unsupported_callback
configSchema.description: Preview not supported: callback destinations deliver results via HTTP and are not queryable from the Preview tab.

configSchema.name: __none_destination_hint
configSchema.description: No persistence: this node will run and then drop results. Use only when a downstream compute step handles persistence.

configSchema.name: table
configSchema.label: Table / Collection
configSchema.description: ClickHouse: leave empty to use abl_platform.custom_pipeline_results, or enter an existing database.table for a custom table. MongoDB: leave empty to use custom_pipeline_results, or enter an existing collection name.

configSchema.name: callbackUrl
configSchema.label: Callback URL
configSchema.description: HTTP callback URL for results delivery

configSchema.name: sourceStep
configSchema.label: Source Step
configSchema.description: Step to read data from (all steps if omitted)

configSchema.name: scorePath
configSchema.label: Score Path
configSchema.description: Expression path for the single numeric analytics score saved to ClickHouse

configSchema.name: scoreName
configSchema.label: Score Name
configSchema.description: Name stored with the ClickHouse score

configSchema.name: documentPath
configSchema.label: Mongo Document Path
configSchema.description: Expression path for the full payload saved as a MongoDB document

configSchema.name: source
configSchema.label: Source Label
configSchema.description: Source label for ClickHouse writes

configSchema.name: document
configSchema.label: Document Template
configSchema.description: Field mapping template for MongoDB writes

label: Store Insight
description: Write InsightResult from a compute handler to ClickHouse insight_results table

configSchema.name: sourceStep
configSchema.label: Source Step
configSchema.description: Step containing InsightResult (auto-detected if omitted)

configSchema.name: retentionDays
configSchema.label: Retention Days
configSchema.description: TTL in days for the stored insight records

recordsWritten.description: Number of rows written to ClickHouse

insightType.description: Handler type that produced the result

granularity.description: Granularity level of the stored result

label: Send Notification
description: Send a notification via webhook, Slack, email, or WebSocket

configSchema.name: channel
configSchema.label: Notification Channel
configSchema.description: Delivery channel for the notification

configSchema.name: webhookUrl
configSchema.label: Webhook URL
configSchema.description: Webhook or Slack incoming webhook URL

configSchema.name: method
configSchema.label: HTTP Method
configSchema.description: HTTP method for webhook delivery

configSchema.name: headers
configSchema.label: HTTP Headers
configSchema.description: Additional headers for webhook delivery

configSchema.name: body
configSchema.label: Body Template
configSchema.description: Body template with expression-resolved field values

label: Transform Data
description: Reshape and combine data from previous steps using expression-based mapping

configSchema.name: mapping
configSchema.label: Field Mapping
configSchema.description: Output field to expression path mapping (e.g. { "score": "steps.eval.output.scores.toxicity" })

label: Inspect Output
description: Expose a previous node output for quick preview and debugging

configSchema.name: sourceStep
configSchema.label: Source Node
configSchema.description: Named node reference to inspect, for example read_messages

configSchema.name: fieldPath
configSchema.label: Field Path
configSchema.description: Optional output field path to inspect. Leave empty to show the full output

label: Run Legacy Workflow
description: Bridge: execute an existing Temporal system workflow and return its result

configSchema.name: workflow
configSchema.label: Workflow Name
configSchema.description: Temporal workflow name to execute (e.g. evaluateSessionMetrics)

configSchema.name: taskQueue
configSchema.label: Task Queue
configSchema.description: Temporal task queue (uses workflow default if omitted)

data.description: Result from the Temporal workflow execution

label: HTTP Request
description: Make external HTTP calls with template substitution in URL, headers, and body

configSchema.name: url
configSchema.label: URL
configSchema.description: Request URL. Use {{steps.stepId.output.field}} for dynamic values.

configSchema.name: method
configSchema.label: HTTP Method
configSchema.description: HTTP method to use

configSchema.name: timeoutMs
configSchema.label: Timeout (ms)
configSchema.description: Request timeout in milliseconds

configSchema.name: headers
configSchema.label: Headers
configSchema.description: Request headers. Values support {{template}} placeholders.

configSchema.name: body
configSchema.label: Request Body
configSchema.description: Request body (ignored for GET/HEAD). Supports {{template}} placeholders.

body.description: Parsed JSON or raw text response body

label: Simulate Persona
description: Generate next persona message given conversation context and persona configuration

configSchema.name: persona
configSchema.label: Persona Config
configSchema.description: PersonaConfig with style, traits, and goals

configSchema.name: scenario
configSchema.label: Scenario Config
configSchema.description: ScenarioConfig with entry agent and milestones

configSchema.name: conversation
configSchema.label: Conversation History
configSchema.description: Current conversation history as array of messages

configSchema.name: personaModel
configSchema.label: Persona Model
configSchema.description: LLM model override for persona simulation

configSchema.name: temperature
configSchema.label: Temperature
configSchema.description: LLM temperature for persona message generation

configSchema.name: maxTokens
configSchema.label: Max Tokens
configSchema.description: Maximum output tokens for persona messages

label: Execute Agent Turn
description: Send a message to the agent-under-test via Runtime HTTP API and collect response and traces

configSchema.name: message
configSchema.label: User Message
configSchema.description: User message to send to the agent

configSchema.name: sessionId
configSchema.label: Session ID
configSchema.description: Runtime session ID (null for first turn to create a new session)

configSchema.name: entryAgent
configSchema.label: Entry Agent
configSchema.description: Agent name for the first turn of conversation

configSchema.name: runtimeUrl
configSchema.label: Runtime URL
configSchema.description: Runtime API base URL (uses default if omitted)

sessionId.description: Runtime session ID for subsequent turns

label: Run Eval Conversation
description: Orchestrate a full multi-turn persona-agent conversation with milestone tracking

configSchema.name: persona
configSchema.label: Persona Config
configSchema.description: PersonaConfig defining conversation persona behavior

configSchema.name: scenario
configSchema.label: Scenario Config
configSchema.description: ScenarioConfig with entry agent and milestones

configSchema.name: runId
configSchema.label: Run ID
configSchema.description: EvalRun ID for tracking this conversation

configSchema.name: variantIndex
configSchema.label: Variant Index
configSchema.description: Variant number within the evaluation cell

configSchema.name: personaModel
configSchema.label: Persona Model
configSchema.description: LLM model for persona simulation

configSchema.name: personaTemperature
configSchema.label: Persona Temperature
configSchema.description: LLM temperature for persona message generation

configSchema.name: personaMaxTokens
configSchema.label: Persona Max Tokens
configSchema.description: Maximum output tokens for persona messages

configSchema.name: runtimeUrl
configSchema.label: Runtime URL
configSchema.description: Runtime API base URL (uses default if omitted)

traceEvents.description: All trace events from agent execution

label: Judge Conversation
description: Score a conversation using LLM judge, code scorer, trajectory scorer, or human review

configSchema.name: conversation
configSchema.label: Conversation
configSchema.description: Conversation turns to evaluate (array of message objects)

configSchema.name: evaluator
configSchema.label: Evaluator Config
configSchema.description: EvaluatorConfig with type, rubric, and bias settings

configSchema.name: traceEvents
configSchema.label: Trace Events
configSchema.description: Trace events for trajectory scoring

configSchema.name: persona
configSchema.label: Persona Config
configSchema.description: PersonaConfig for context-aware judging

configSchema.name: scenario
configSchema.label: Scenario Config
configSchema.description: ScenarioConfig for milestone verification

configSchema.name: variantIndex
configSchema.label: Variant Index
configSchema.description: Variant index for result grouping

configSchema.name: runId
configSchema.label: Run ID
configSchema.description: EvalRun ID for result association

passed.description: Whether the score meets passing threshold

label: Aggregate Eval Run
description: Compute run-level aggregates (mean, stdDev, 95% CI, Pass@k) and detect regressions against baseline

configSchema.name: runId
configSchema.label: Run ID
configSchema.description: EvalRun ID to aggregate

configSchema.name: evalSetId
configSchema.label: Eval Set ID
configSchema.description: EvalSet ID for result grouping

configSchema.name: baselineRunId
configSchema.label: Baseline Run ID
configSchema.description: Baseline run ID for regression detection

configSchema.name: regressionThreshold
configSchema.label: Regression Threshold
configSchema.description: Maximum acceptable score drop from baseline before flagging regression

configSchema.name: variants
configSchema.label: Variants
configSchema.description: Number of variants per cell (for Pass@k calculation)

summary.description: RunSummary with statistics (mean, stdDev, ci95, passRate)

label: Parallel Group
description: Execute child nodes in parallel and wait for all to complete

label: Wait for Event
description: Pause execution until a named event is received or timeout expires

configSchema.name: eventName
configSchema.label: Event Name
configSchema.description: Name of the event to wait for

configSchema.name: timeoutMs
configSchema.label: Timeout (ms)
configSchema.description: Maximum wait time in milliseconds

configSchema.name: timeoutAction
configSchema.label: Timeout Action
configSchema.description: Action to take when timeout expires

configSchema.name: defaultValue
configSchema.label: Default Value
configSchema.description: Default value to use when timeoutAction is default-value

label: Delay
description: Pause execution for a fixed duration

configSchema.name: durationMs
configSchema.label: Duration (ms)
configSchema.description: How long to pause execution in milliseconds

label: Sub-Pipeline
description: Execute another pipeline as a nested step

configSchema.name: pipelineId
configSchema.label: Pipeline ID
configSchema.description: ID of the pipeline to execute as a sub-pipeline

configSchema.name: inputMapping
configSchema.label: Input Mapping
configSchema.description: Map parent context fields to sub-pipeline input

label: Database Query
description: Execute a query against ClickHouse or MongoDB

configSchema.name: database
configSchema.label: Database
configSchema.description: Target database engine

configSchema.name: sessionId
configSchema.label: Session ID
configSchema.description: Session to query. Leave blank to use the session from the pipeline trigger automatically.

configSchema.name: query
configSchema.label: Query
configSchema.description: Query to execute. Leave blank to return all rows for the session. Auto-filled when you select a table or collection above.

configSchema.name: table
configSchema.label: Table
configSchema.description: ClickHouse table to query. Only session_id-indexed tables are permitted.

configSchema.name: collection
configSchema.label: Collection
configSchema.description: MongoDB collection to query. Only allowlisted collections are permitted.

configSchema.name: limit
configSchema.label: Row Limit
configSchema.description: Maximum number of rows to return (hard cap: 10)

label: Filter
description: Filter data from a source using an expression

configSchema.name: source
configSchema.label: Data Source
configSchema.description: Data source to filter (step output reference)

configSchema.name: expression
configSchema.label: Filter Expression
configSchema.description: Filter expression to evaluate against each item

label: Aggregate
description: Aggregate data from a source using specified operations

configSchema.name: source
configSchema.label: Data Source
configSchema.description: Data source to aggregate (step output reference)

configSchema.name: operations
configSchema.label: Operations
configSchema.description: Aggregation operations to perform (e.g. sum, avg, count, min, max)

label: Send Email
description: Send an email message

configSchema.name: to
configSchema.label: Recipient
configSchema.description: Email recipient address

configSchema.name: subject
configSchema.label: Subject
configSchema.description: Email subject line

configSchema.name: body
configSchema.label: Body
configSchema.description: Email body content

label: Send Slack Message
description: Send a message to a Slack channel

configSchema.name: channel
configSchema.label: Channel
configSchema.description: Slack channel name or ID

configSchema.name: message
configSchema.label: Message
configSchema.description: Message text to send

configSchema.name: webhookUrl
configSchema.label: Webhook URL
configSchema.description: Slack webhook URL override (uses configured default if omitted)

label: Publish to Kafka
description: Publish a message to a Kafka topic

configSchema.name: topic
configSchema.label: Topic
configSchema.description: Kafka topic to publish to

configSchema.name: key
configSchema.label: Message Key
configSchema.description: Message key for partitioning

configSchema.name: payload
configSchema.label: Payload
configSchema.description: Message payload to publish

label: Compute Goal Completion
description: Evaluate whether the agent successfully completed the customer's goal using LLM analysis. Writes results to ClickHouse goal_completions table.

configSchema.name: systemPrompt
configSchema.label: System Prompt
configSchema.description: Custom system prompt for the goal completion evaluator

configSchema.name: criteria
configSchema.label: Evaluation Criteria
configSchema.description: List of criteria to evaluate (e.g. issue_diagnosed, solution_provided). If empty, the LLM identifies criteria automatically.

configSchema.name: model
configSchema.label: LLM Model
configSchema.description: Model to use for evaluation (uses project default if not specified)
